Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
4.26 Licenses in Achaea
(See also
HELP BOOKMAKING
,
HELP JEWELLERY
,
HELP CRAFTING
,
HELP TAILORING
,
HELP
COOKING
,
HELP HERALDRY
, HELP LICENSED MASTER SHOPKEEPER, HELP FOR RUNNERS)
Several
licenses
are available to the aspiring crafter or tradesman.
- If you want to be a
bookie
, try
HELP BOOKMAKING
.
- If you want to be an
herald
, try
HELP HERALDRY
.
- If you want to be a jeweller, try
HELP JEWELLERY
.
- If you want to be a
tailor
, try
HELP TAILORING
.
- If you want to be a cook, try
HELP COOKING
.
- If you want to be a furnisher, try
HELP FURNISHING
- If you want to be a licensed master
shopkeeper
, try
HELP LMS
.
- If you want to be a licensed
lottery
runner
, try HELP FOR RUNNERS.
(See also
HELP BOOKMAKING
,
HELP JEWELLERY
,
HELP CRAFTING
,
HELP TAILORING
, HELP
COOKING,
HELP FURNISHING
,
HELP HERALDRY
, HELP LICENSED MASTER SHOPKEEPER, HELP
FOR RUNNERS)
